name: com.apple.secondethernet.managed
title: 802.1X: Second Ethernet
description: The payload that configures the second wired Ethernet interface.

payloadkeys.content: Keys relevant to 802.1x configuration.  User enrollment payloads do not support the various proxy keys including ProxyType, ProxyServer, ProxyServerPort, ProxyUsername, ProxyPassword,, ProxyPACURL and ProxyPACFallbackAllowed.
